resolved: All six workflow acceptance criteria are expanded in the plan.
Stable role order and provider priority are explicit final tie-breakers.
The ROLE_QUALITY_BANDS module location is explicit.
Deterministic final tie-breaker coverage is required.
Direct run_llm_task consistency and fail-closed integration coverage is required.
residual_risks: Production model choices can change and require targeted dry-run comparison.
A strict quality floor can intentionally leave no eligible route.
Health and cooldown must remain ahead of free preference.
